creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: glarkin
Date: Wed Jul  3 21:28:41 2013
New Revision: 322260
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322260

Log:
  - Updated to 3.1.0 [1]
  - Added license
  - Minor tweaks to dependency versions
  
  PR:		ports/180142 [1]
  Submitted by:	swills

Modified:
  head/net/rubygem-rightaws/Makefile
  head/net/rubygem-rightaws/distinfo

Modified: head/net/rubygem-rightaws/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rubygem-rightaws/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 21:10:44 2013	(r322259)
+++ head/net/rubygem-rightaws/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 21:28:41 2013	(r322260)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rightaws
-PORTVERSION=	1.10.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	net rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 DISTNAME=	right_aws-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -11,7 +10,9 @@ DISTNAME=	right_aws-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	glarkin@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Provides access to Amazon EC2, S3, SQS, and SDB web services
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-righthttpconnection>=1.2.4:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-righthttpconnection
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-righthttpconnection>=1.2.5:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-righthttpconnection
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
@@ -25,7 +26,7 @@ LIBXML_DESC=	Use libxml instead of REXML
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLIBXML}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	rubygem-libxml-ruby>=2.3.3:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-libxml-ruby
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	rubygem-libxml-ruby>=0.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-libxml-ruby
 .else
 USE_RUBY_FEATURES=	rexml
 .endif

Modified: head/net/rubygem-rightaws/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rubygem-rightaws/distinfo	Wed Jul  3 21:10:44 2013	(r322259)
+++ head/net/rubygem-rightaws/distinfo	Wed Jul  3 21:28:41 2013	(r322260)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/right_aws-1.10.0.gem) = c911f839a3aac2f08398408d7b7631811a877d1199d1850a861278893e776992
-SIZE (rubygem/right_aws-1.10.0.gem) = 101376
+SHA256 (rubygem/right_aws-3.1.0.gem) = 0928c81580e38c9feec0edf6fc9616a2c8e54ccbf3677312b6e800bcfd2e74a8
+SIZE (rubygem/right_aws-3.1.0.gem) = 199680
